patterns.description: Multiple config YAML files (models.yaml, workers.yaml, providers.yaml) are edited frequently, with models.yaml alone appearing in 36 sessions.
patterns.recommendation: Centralize configuration into a single validated schema and add automated linting to reduce manual edits.

patterns.description: Files related to dispatch (dispatch.md, run.py, dispatch_cmd.py) are accessed in 3‑5 sessions each, indicating heavy reliance on routing logic.
patterns.recommendation: Extract dispatch components into reusable modules and add comprehensive unit tests to improve maintainability.

patterns.description: Skill files under .claude/skills are edited repeatedly (SKILL.md, update/SKILL.md, _shared/dispatch.md) across 3‑7 sessions.
patterns.recommendation: Version‑control skill definitions separately and generate documentation to track changes and dependencies.

patterns.description: README.md and core router files (lane_policy.py, resolve.py, model_registry.py) see multiple accesses, reflecting active onboarding and routing work.
patterns.recommendation: Enhance onboarding guides with diagrams and automate router policy validation to reduce manual adjustments.

patterns.description: Doctor command files (doctor_cmd.py) and its tests (test_doctor.py) are edited frequently, showing ongoing debugging efforts.
patterns.recommendation: Integrate doctor functionality into CI pipeline and expand test coverage to catch issues earlier.

patterns.description: The plan file you-re-not-dealing-with-hidden-russell.md is opened 4 times, suggesting it contains critical guidance that is being consulted often.
patterns.recommendation: Make the plan explicit in project documentation and link it to relevant tasks to ensure consistency.
